reforms.description: The Swiss Parliament has adopted legislation for more stringent emission performance standards for new passenger cars, aligning with EU regulations, to enhance environmental performance in the transport sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing environmental performance can lead to innovation in the automotive sector and improve overall economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The legislation has been adopted and is in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant legislative change aimed at improving environmental standards.
reforms.source_quote: The Swiss Parliament has recently adopted legislation for more stringent emission performance standards for new passenger cars, in line with EU regulation.

reforms.description: The Swiss government launched a buildings programme providing financial incentives for energy-saving renovations, funded by a CO levy on fossil fuels, and amended rental laws to allow owners to pass on renovation costs to tenants, incentivizing energy-efficient upgrades in rental properties.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative promotes energy efficiency, which can lead to innovation in construction and renovation sectors, enhancing overall economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The buildings programme and rental law amendment have been enacted and are operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms provide significant incentives for energy efficiency but do not represent a complete overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: In January 2008, an amendment to the rental law came into force which specifies that certain energy-saving renovation efforts of living spaces and premises undertaken by the owner are to be treated as value-enhancing investments.

reforms.description: A proposal has been announced to eliminate capital taxes and remove taxes on the issuance of equity securities to reduce barriers for business creation and enhance entrepreneurial activity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing tax barriers can stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation, leading to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: The proposal represents a significant change in the tax structure aimed at fostering business creation.
reforms.source_quote: Remove taxes on the issuance of equity securities.
